name: Rich Chocolate Mint Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in the eggs one at a time.
4. Melt the baking chocolate in a double boiler and stir it into the butter and egg mixture.
5. Sift together the flour and salt, then add them alternately with the milk to the batter.
6. Mix in the vanilla, dried mint, and chopped nuts until well combined.
7. Pour the batter into an 8-inch square cake pan.
8. Bake for 50 minutes.
9. Serve chilled or iced with a simple chocolate glaze decorated with sugared mint leaves. To make the sugar leaves, rinse fresh mint leaves in cold water, dip them in egg whites, and roll them in fine granulated sugar. Place them on waxed paper to dry.
